name: io.github.mmmikael/arelay
description: End-to-end encrypted inbox for AI agents: deliver reports, files, and artifacts to a human's private inbox, and submit email drafts for human approval.

environmentVariables.name: ARELAY_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Agent token created in the Agent Relay portal under Account → Agent tokens.

environmentVariables.name: ARELAY_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Agent Relay deployment. Defaults to https://arelay.app.
